Overview Package Class Index No Frames Frames Prev Next

Summary: TYPE
xcfinfo

xcfinfo_types

TYPE Summary
public t_app_config RECORD
t_app_config — complete parsed state of a Genero application XCF file. id — application name derived from the XCF filename (without .xcf extension) parent — parent application identifier from the Parent XML attribute path — execution path from the PATH node in the EXECUTION section module — module name from the MODULE node in the EXECUTION section env_vars — application-level env var overrides from the EXECUTION section
public t_env_var RECORD
t_env_var — a single environment variable entry from an EXECUTION component. id — environment variable name value — variable value; may contain $(token) references concat — merge rule when app overrides GAS value: APPEND, PREPEND, or empty (replace)
public t_env_var_list DYNAMIC ARRAY OF t_env_var
t_env_var_list — dynamic array of t_env_var; used for both GAS execution component and app-level env var lists.
public t_gas_config RECORD
t_gas_config — complete parsed state of the GAS server configuration (as.xcf). resources — all resources parsed from the RESOURCE_LIST exec_env — env vars from the cpn.wa.execution.local execution component groups — group-to-path mappings from APPLICATION_LIST, SERVICE_LIST, and group XML files server_port — TCP port the GAS dispatcher listens on (from TCP_SERVER_PORT)
public t_group RECORD
t_group — a group mapping entry from APPLICATION_LIST, SERVICE_LIST, or a group XML file. id — group identifier used in the browser URL path (e.g. "dev") path — filesystem directory the group maps to group_type — routing type: "ua" for interactive applications, "ws" for web services
public t_group_list DYNAMIC ARRAY OF t_group
t_group_list — dynamic array of t_group; accumulates all group mappings from all sources.
public t_resource RECORD
Type definitions shared by xcfinfo modules.
public t_resource_list DYNAMIC ARRAY OF t_resource
t_resource_list — dynamic array of t_resource; holds all resources parsed from the RESOURCE_LIST in as.xcf.

Types

t_app_config

public TYPE t_app_config RECORD
    
id STRING
parent STRING
path STRING
module STRING
env_vars t_env_var_list
END RECORD

t_app_config — complete parsed state of a Genero application XCF file. id — application name derived from the XCF filename (without .xcf extension) parent — parent application identifier from the Parent XML attribute path — execution path from the PATH node in the EXECUTION section module — module name from the MODULE node in the EXECUTION section env_vars — application-level env var overrides from the EXECUTION section

t_env_var

public TYPE t_env_var RECORD
    
id STRING
value STRING
concat STRING
END RECORD

t_env_var — a single environment variable entry from an EXECUTION component. id — environment variable name value — variable value; may contain $(token) references concat — merge rule when app overrides GAS value: APPEND, PREPEND, or empty (replace)

t_env_var_list

public TYPE t_env_var_list DYNAMIC ARRAY OF t_env_var

t_env_var_list — dynamic array of t_env_var; used for both GAS execution component and app-level env var lists.

t_gas_config

public TYPE t_gas_config RECORD
    
resources t_resource_list
exec_env t_env_var_list
groups t_group_list
server_port STRING
END RECORD

t_gas_config — complete parsed state of the GAS server configuration (as.xcf). resources — all resources parsed from the RESOURCE_LIST exec_env — env vars from the cpn.wa.execution.local execution component groups — group-to-path mappings from APPLICATION_LIST, SERVICE_LIST, and group XML files server_port — TCP port the GAS dispatcher listens on (from TCP_SERVER_PORT)

t_group

public TYPE t_group RECORD
    
id STRING
path STRING
group_type STRING
END RECORD

t_group — a group mapping entry from APPLICATION_LIST, SERVICE_LIST, or a group XML file. id — group identifier used in the browser URL path (e.g. "dev") path — filesystem directory the group maps to group_type — routing type: "ua" for interactive applications, "ws" for web services

t_group_list

public TYPE t_group_list DYNAMIC ARRAY OF t_group

t_group_list — dynamic array of t_group; accumulates all group mappings from all sources.

t_resource

public TYPE t_resource RECORD
    
id STRING
source STRING
value STRING
END RECORD

Type definitions shared by xcfinfo modules.

Defines the record structures and array types used to hold parsed GAS server configuration (as.xcf) and Genero application XCF data. t_resource — a single resource entry from the GAS RESOURCE_LIST. id — resource identifier (e.g. "res.ic.server.port") source — origin type: INTERNAL, ENVIRON, UNX, or PLATFORM_INDEPENDENT value — resource value; may contain $(token) references resolved by expand_refs()

t_resource_list

public TYPE t_resource_list DYNAMIC ARRAY OF t_resource

t_resource_list — dynamic array of t_resource; holds all resources parsed from the RESOURCE_LIST in as.xcf.
